theme_strategy.rationale: CodeVerse Institute aims to attract students interested in tech and coding. A dark mode default with terminal-inspired aesthetics instantly resonates with developers, while high-contrast neon accents convey a modern, silicon-valley energy. A light mode toggle should be provided for accessibility.

primary.name: Volt Green
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, and high-priority highlights. Use sparingly to maintain impact.

secondary.name: Electric Orange
secondary.usage: Secondary actions, warning states, and contrasting visual accents in bento grids.

headings.usage: All major page titles, section headings, and large statistic numbers. Never center by default.

mono.usage: Overlines, labels, technical metadata (tags, repository links), and small UI text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Avoid cramped containers. Use p-8 or p-12 for cards.

grids.landing_page: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical layouts with col-span-8 for hero elements and col-span-4 for supporting blocks. Leave empty cells for breathing room.
grids.dashboard: Mode B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Use col-span-3 for main data, col-span-1 for summaries. Every pixel utilized.

spacing_and_layout.containers: All containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision. Mobile images must use max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.

surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-black/60 (dark), backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10. Must have 1px delicate inner stroke.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders for technical look. Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy box-shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and Volt Green border glow.
surface_strategies.inputs: Neumorphic tactile variant mixed with sharp edges. High contrast text.

motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY for marketing pages to add weight and premium feel.
motion.interactions: All interactive elements must have hover states (e.g., hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800).
motion.page_transitions: Use framer-motion for staggered entrance of grid items. Do not use generic 'transition: all'.

custom: HeroSection (Raw HTML/Tailwind, complex overlap, no Shadcn wrappers)
BentoGallery (Asymmetric grid for student projects/institute photos)
shadcn: Button (Pill-shaped or sharp, customized with Volt Green)
Input, Textarea, Form (For Inquiry and Project Upload)
components.toast: Use 'sonner' for all notifications (success, error, auth).

landing_page.hero: Bold typography ('Launch Your Tech Career'), abstract background, dual CTAs (Explore Courses, Student Login).
landing_page.courses: Cards with overlapping images, hover to reveal curriculum details.
landing_page.gallery: Masonry or Bento grid of institute and student images.

student_portal.dashboard: High-density grid. Metrics: Total Projects, Profile Views. List of uploaded projects.
student_portal.upload_form: Clean, multi-step or well-sectioned form. Fields: Title, Desc, Images, Demo Link, GitHub Link, Tech Stack tags.
student_portal.auth: Google OAuth button prominent. Managed via Emergent auth context.

public_profiles.student_profile: URL: /student/{studentname}. Minimalist header with student info. Grid of their projects. SEO meta tags are critical here.
public_profiles.project_detail: URL: /student/project/{projectname}. Full-width hero image of project, split layout for description and technical details (GitHub/Live links).

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-google-button', data-testid='upload-project-submit').

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Use Named exports for components and Default exports for pages.
Never use generic AI emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
Implement Google OAuth using standard patterns suitable for the Emergent-managed environment.
Ensure SEO by dynamically setting document.title and meta tags for the Student Profile and Project Detail pages.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in sticky headers or dropdowns. Always use a backdrop-blur or solid color.
Apply specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform) rather than 'all'.
